mapper.sql: id , name, app_id, platform_id, description, created_by, last_updated_by, created_time, last_updated_time, tenant_id, renter_id, site_id
mapper.select:
SELECT rg.id, rg.app_id, rg.platform_id, rg.name, rg.description, rg.created_by, rg.last_updated_by, rg.created_time, rg.last_updated_time, rg.tenant_id, rg.renter_id, rg.site_id, r.id as resource_id, r.app_id as resource_app_id, r.platform_id as resource_platform_id, r.name as resource_name, r.resource_url, r.thumbnail_url, r.category, r.description as resource_description, r.thumbnail_data, r.resource_data, r.public_status, r.is_default, r.created_by as resource_created_by, r.last_updated_by as resource_last_updated_by, r.created_time as resource_created_time, r.last_updated_time as resource_last_updated_time, r.tenant_id as resource_tenant_id, r.renter_id as resource_renter_id, r.site_id as resource_site_id FROM t_resource_group rg LEFT JOIN r_resource_group_resource rgr ON rgr.resource_group_id = rg.id LEFT JOIN t_resource r ON r.id = rgr.resource_id AND r.id IS NOT NULL
AND rg.created_by = #{groupCreatedBy}
